; === BASIC loader (lines 6-11) ===
; 6 DIM MC$(717,1)
; 7 AD=VARPTR(MC$)-1
; 8 FOR I=0 TO 1434:READ V:POKE AD+I,V:NEXT I
; 9 FOR I=0 TO 117:READ P
; 10 L=PEEK(AD+P):H=PEEK(AD+P+1):W=L+H*256+AD
; 11 POKE AD+P,W-INT(W/256)*256:POKE AD+P+1,INT(W/256):NEXT I
